about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: My name is <0>Eduardo Vinícius dos Santos Rodrigues</0>, and I'm a student in <0>front-end</0> and <0>back-end</0> development. I grew up surrounded by the digital world, which always sparked my curiosity. Every website, app, or game I used made me wonder how it all worked behind the screen. Today, my goal is exactly that: to build these experiences, understand every step of the process, and be one of the people who create them, not just one of the people who use them.
about.paragraph2: I graduated from <0>DevQuest</0>, by <1>DevEmDobro</1>, where I had the chance to learn from excellent teachers. That's where I built a foundation in programming logic, the core technologies I still use today, and good practices.
about.paragraph3: I enjoy turning ideas into <0>intuitive</0> and <0>pleasant-to-use interfaces</0>. I work mainly with <0>React</0> and <0>TypeScript</0> on the front-end, and I'm expanding my knowledge of <0>Prisma</0>.
about.paragraph4: What motivates me most is bringing an interface to life. I believe small details — animations, transitions, and how an application responds to user interactions — make all the difference between a site that just works and one that conveys quality and attention to detail.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: What I can build for you.

service1.title: Front-end Development
service1.description: Building modern, responsive, and intuitive interfaces with HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.

service2.title: React Applications
service2.description: Developing applications with React and TypeScript using reusable components and the Context API.

service3.title: UI & UX
service3.description: Turning Figma prototypes into interfaces that are faithful to the design, responsive, and accessible.

service4.title: Best Practices
service4.description: Clean code, component organization, accessibility, responsiveness, and a focus on performance.

formation.title: My Education
